items.claim: Cody Durden is an unreliable fighter to predict for a win.
items.quote: Cody Deran is one of the least, or I should say, one of the most unreliable fighters to predict to win a fight.

items.claim: Alessandro Costa is well-rounded with decent grappling and heavy-handed striking.
items.quote: He's pretty well-rounded for the flyweight division. Has decent grappling. Has okay striking with heavy hands.

items.claim: Cody Durden is a one-dimensional fighter with no power.
items.quote: Cody Duran is kind of just one-dimensional. No power.

items.claim: Cody Durden's wrestling ability is overrated.
items.quote: his wrestling I think has been overrated throughout the years.

items.claim: Farid Basharat has been in the UFC for almost a decade and remains undefeated.
items.quote: He's been in the UFC for almost a decade, it seems, and he's still undefeated.

items.claim: Farid Basharat is not a finisher.
items.quote: He always wins, but he's not a finisher.

items.claim: Ethan Ewing possesses overwhelming boxing and high output.
items.quote: his boxing is just so overwhelming. And he's like a high output Prean.
